entry.name: showPercentText
entry.label: Append a % sign after the number in the panel.

entry.name: showTimeLeft
entry.label: Show time remaining in the 5-hour window in the panel.

entry.name: showWeekly
entry.label: Show the weekly (7-day) limit in the popup.

entry.name: showScoped
entry.label: Show the weekly model-scoped limit in the popup.

entry.name: refreshSeconds
entry.label: How often to poll Claude for updated usage, in seconds.
